category_sources: Official GitHub README describes sing-box as the universal proxy platform.
display_name_sources: Official documentation site title and GitHub repository use sing-box.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links documentation to https://sing-box.sagernet.org.
Official documentation homepage includes Manual, Configuration, and Installation sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/SagerNet/sing-box, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs navigation includes proxy, DNS, route, inbound, and outbound configuration areas.
